Eau de Parfum  ·  House of Cien

An Infinite
Impression

Iconic fragrances, reimagined for those who refuse to choose between artistry and accessibility.

The House

Scent is memory.
We bottle it without compromise.

CIEN exists for the curious — those who chase the world's most celebrated fragrances but refuse to pay for the name alone. Each bottle is composed by perfumers trained in the same ateliers as the houses that inspire us, using fine fragrance-grade oils and a 20% concentration eau de parfum strength.

No shortcuts. No dilution. Just the scent — distilled to its essence, and presented in glass worth keeping on your vanity.

The Collection

Four Scents, Infinitely Yours

No. 01 — Gourmand Floral

Vanilla Deity

Inspired by Burberry Goddess

A warm, sun-drenched vanilla wrapped in white florals and amber musk. Soft, radiant, and impossible to ignore — built for the woman who walks in slowly and leaves a trail behind.

TopMandarin, Bergamot
HeartJasmine, Orange Blossom
BaseVanilla, Amber, Musk
$48 · 30ml Add to Bag
No. 02 — Dark Gourmand

Forbidden Cherry

Inspired by Tom Ford Lost Cherry

Black cherry liqueur folded into bitter almond, rich tonka, and a whisper of smoke. Sensual and a little dangerous — the scent equivalent of a held gaze across the room.

TopBlack Cherry, Almond
HeartTurkish Rose, Plum
BaseTonka, Sandalwood, Smoke
$48 · 30ml Add to Bag
No. 03 — Tobacco Vanille

Velvet Embers

Inspired by Tom Ford Tobacco Vanille

Sweet tobacco leaf, cocoa, and spiced vanilla settle into dried fruit and soft woods. A fireside scent for cold nights — opulent, slow-burning, unforgettable.

TopTobacco Leaf, Spice
HeartCocoa, Dried Fruit
BaseVanilla, Woods, Tonka
$48 · 30ml Add to Bag
No. 04 — Fruity Oriental

Desert Peach

Inspired by Guerlain Peche Mirage

Sun-ripened peach meets honeyed amber and warm musk — a scent that holds the heat of late afternoon long after the sun has gone down.

TopPeach, Apricot
HeartHoney, Jasmine
BaseAmber, Musk, Sandalwood
$48 · 30ml Add to Bag
The Ritual

Wear it like
it's already yours.

Mist onto pulse points — wrists, collarbone, the nape of the neck — where warmth lifts the scent throughout the day. A single spray on hair lets the fragrance linger long after you've left the room.

Presentation

Glass worth
the keeping.

Every bottle is housed in weighted, faceted glass with a brushed gold collar and matte cap — finished in a quiet taupe box that earns its place on a shelf.

30ml · 1 fl. oz. · 20% fragrance concentration.
